modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Laptop screen has vertical and horizontal lines with distortion.

full_description_text:  
I was just using my laptop when I noticed these weird lines running down and across the screen. It’s like the video is all distorted, and it’s super hard to see anything clearly. I’ve got a Fujitsu, but I’ve also seen this on HP and Lenovo laptops, so I’m not sure if it’s just mine or a bigger issue. Plus, there’s a crack on the screen that makes it even worse!
short_description: Laptop screen has vertical and horizontal lines with distortion.
